articles.title: 中美关系需复盘过往矛盾，规避重复对抗
articles.summary: 美国青年学子贝弗利•弗洛雷斯表示，中美关系的改善不仅需要政府层面的沟通，更需要民间社会的持续交流。

articles.title: Trump's Oman outburst throws 'Switzerland of the Middle East' into the spotlight
articles.summary: The Trump administration has threatened sanctions and military action against Oman, a longtime ally and close security partner.

articles.title: Iran reportedly launches missiles as Trump mulls deal to pause war for two months
articles.summary: The latest military and economic actions come as President Trump insists he feels no pressure to make a deal with Iran before November's midterm elections.

articles.title: Capital One Venture X Business Card review: Premium perks for business travelers
Nvidia is investing billions into this emerging technology that could change the AI industry
articles.summary: Photonics is considered to be a more efficient alternative to the current process of transferring data using electricity, which could be crucial to the AI boom.

articles.title: 广告的边界，影响着消费的边界
articles.summary: 刘远举：众需要明白，广告不承担教书育人的功能，除了面向未成年人的广告，它本身是成年人社会的东西。所以，需要用同一把尺子去衡量。

articles.title: XREAL徐驰：真正的AI眼镜需要五件事同时发生
articles.summary: 徐驰：真正的变化是，下一代入口不一定是单一设备，而是谁能在更多真实场景中理解用户意图。

articles.title: 特朗普正在搅乱美加墨贸易区
articles.summary: 贝蒂：美国总统头脑简单的保护主义，往好了说会带来更多无关紧要的小修小补，往坏了说可能导致贸易关系的严重破裂。

articles.title: Pittsburgh Steelers quarterback Aaron Rodgers’ estranged parents sell Chico home for $1.7 million
articles.summary: NFL star Aaron Rodgers’ parents have scored a major real estate win after offloading their longtime California home for $1.68 million just a few weeks after listing the property.

articles.title: The double 10K scenario: Wall Street veteran says the S&P 500 and gold can each reach that mark by the end of the decade
articles.summary: As the S&P 500 soars even higher by the end of the decade, gold will be going along for the ride, says Yardeni Research.

articles.title: I’m setting up brokerage accounts for my grandkids in my daughter’s name. Is that wise — or am I asking for trouble?
articles.summary: “The contributions are invested in mutual funds tracking the S&P 500, small-cap stocks and international equities.”

articles.title: 酷夏临近，伊拉克面临严峻的停电形势
articles.summary: 伊拉克在发电方面依赖从伊朗进口的天然气，但美以的军事行动切断了这一供应，加剧了这个石油资源丰富国家的能源危机。

topic_checks.conflict_detail: 跨文章关键词冲突: 正面关键词 ['突破'] (文章 [4926]) vs 负面关键词 ['fraud'] (文章 [4985])

issues: ❌ 准确性严重不足: 仅0%的断言得到验证 (0/3)
❌ 实时数据更新时间超过24小时,不满足发布时效要求
❌ 存在未回溯的新闻占位引用: 【新闻X】 2处
warnings: ⚠️ 数据更新于28.4小时前,时效性较差

issues: 存在未回溯的新闻占位引用: 【新闻X】 2处

manual_checklist: 确认 Markdown 报告不是简单复述新闻，而是有清晰结论提炼。
确认没有把新闻中的旧行情数字包装成“基于实时数据”或“现价”。
确认没有把同比、环比、财报增速写成当前实时涨跌。
确认 Judgment Cards 区分了事实、推断、风险。
确认观察项承接了证据不足内容，而不是强行输出确定性结论。
确认建议具有跟踪价值，不是模板化、空泛表述。
确认股票推荐评分章节包含总分、子分、等级、数据完整度与失效条件。
